  "text": "The four major kubelet components owned by sig-node are implemented in the following locations within the sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0 repository:\n\n1. **Pod Lifecycle Manager (PLEG)**\n   - Interface: `pkg/kubelet/pleg/pleg.go` — defines `PodLifecycleEventGenerator` interface.\n   - Primary implementation: `pkg/kubelet/pleg/generic.go` — implements `GenericPLEG`, the standard periodic relisting-based pod lifecycle event generator.\n   - Evented implementation: `pkg/kubelet/pleg/evented.go` — implements `EventedPLEG`, which uses CRI container events for low-latency updates.\n   - Pod workers: `pkg/kubelet/pod_workers.go` — manages per-pod goroutines that drive pod lifecycle state transitions (the pod lifecycle state machine).\n\n2. **Container Runtime Interface (CRI) Client**\n   - Primary CRI client: `staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/remote_runtime.go` — implements `NewRemoteRuntimeService`, the gRPC-based CRI runtime service client that kubelet uses to communicate with container runtimes (containerd, CRI-O, etc.).\n   - Runtime manager: `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/kuberuntime_manager.go` — implements `kubeGenericRuntimeManager`, the kubelet-side CRI integration layer that wraps the CRI client and implements `kubecontainer.Runtime`.\n\n3. **Volume Manager**\n   - Main implementation: `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/volume_manager.go` — implements the `VolumeManager` interface; orchestrates attach/detach/mount/unmount of volumes for pods on the node.\n   - Reconciler: `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/reconciler/reconciler_common.go` — reconciles actual vs desired state of mounted volumes.\n   - Desired state populator: `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/populator/desired_state_of_world_populator.go` — watches pods and populates the desired state of world.\n   - State caches: `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/cache/actual_state_of_world.go` and `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/cache/desired_state_of_world.go`.\n\n4. **Device Plugin Manager**\n   - Main implementation: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/manager.go` — implements `ManagerImpl`, which manages device plugin registration, allocation, and lifecycle.\n   - Interface: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/types.go` — defines the `Manager` interface.\n   - Endpoint: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/endpoint.go` — manages gRPC connections to individual device plugins.\n   - Plugin client/server: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/plugin/v1beta1/client.go` and `server.go` — implement the device plugin gRPC API (v1beta1).\n   - Pod devices tracking: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/pod_devices.go` — tracks device allocations per pod/container."
}

## Kubelet Component Ownership Map (sig-node)

### 1. Pod Lifecycle Manager (PLEG)
- **`pkg/kubelet/pleg/pleg.go`** — `PodLifecycleEventGenerator` interface
- **`pkg/kubelet/pleg/generic.go`** — `GenericPLEG` (periodic relisting-based implementation)
- **`pkg/kubelet/pleg/evented.go`** — `EventedPLEG` (CRI event-driven, low-latency)
- **`pkg/kubelet/pod_workers.go`** — per-pod goroutines driving the pod lifecycle state machine

### 2. Container Runtime Interface (CRI) Client
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/remote_runtime.go`** — `NewRemoteRuntimeService`, the gRPC CRI client
- **`pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/kuberuntime_manager.go`** — `kubeGenericRuntimeManager`, kubelet's CRI integration layer

### 3. Volume Manager
- **`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/volume_manager.go`** — `VolumeManager` interface & main implementation
- **`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/reconciler/reconciler_common.go`** — actual vs desired state reconciliation
- **`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/populator/desired_state_of_world_populator.go`** — desired state population
- **`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/cache/actual_state_of_world.go`** and **`desired_state_of_world.go`** — state caches

### 4. Device Plugin Manager
- **`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/manager.go`** — `ManagerImpl` (registration, allocation)
- **`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/types.go`** — `Manager` interface
- **`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/endpoint.go`** — per-plugin gRPC endpoint
- **`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/plugin/v1beta1/client.go`** and **`server.go`** — v1beta1 gRPC plugin API

  "text": "The four major kubelet components owned by sig-node are implemented in the following locations within the sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0 repository:\n\n1. **Pod Lifecycle Manager (PLEG)**\n   - Interface: `pkg/kubelet/pleg/pleg.go` — defines `PodLifecycleEventGenerator` interface.\n   - Primary implementation: `pkg/kubelet/pleg/generic.go` — implements `GenericPLEG`, the standard periodic relisting-based pod lifecycle event generator.\n   - Evented implementation: `pkg/kubelet/pleg/evented.go` — implements `EventedPLEG`, which uses CRI container events for low-latency updates.\n   - Pod workers: `pkg/kubelet/pod_workers.go` — manages per-pod goroutines that drive pod lifecycle state transitions (the pod lifecycle state machine).\n\n2. **Container Runtime Interface (CRI) Client**\n   - Primary CRI client: `staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/remote_runtime.go` — implements `NewRemoteRuntimeService`, the gRPC-based CRI runtime service client that kubelet uses to communicate with container runtimes (containerd, CRI-O, etc.).\n   - Runtime manager: `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/kuberuntime_manager.go` — implements `kubeGenericRuntimeManager`, the kubelet-side CRI integration layer that wraps the CRI client and implements `kubecontainer.Runtime`.\n\n3. **Volume Manager**\n   - Main implementation: `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/volume_manager.go` — implements the `VolumeManager` interface; orchestrates attach/detach/mount/unmount of volumes for pods on the node.\n   - Reconciler: `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/reconciler/reconciler_common.go` — reconciles actual vs desired state of mounted volumes.\n   - Desired state populator: `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/populator/desired_state_of_world_populator.go` — watches pods and populates the desired state of world.\n   - State caches: `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/cache/actual_state_of_world.go` and `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/cache/desired_state_of_world.go`.\n\n4. **Device Plugin Manager**\n   - Main implementation: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/manager.go` — implements `ManagerImpl`, which manages device plugin registration, allocation, and lifecycle.\n   - Interface: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/types.go` — defines the `Manager` interface.\n   - Endpoint: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/endpoint.go` — manages gRPC connections to individual device plugins.\n   - Plugin client/server: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/plugin/v1beta1/client.go` and `server.go` — implement the device plugin gRPC API (v1beta1).\n   - Pod devices tracking: `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/pod_devices.go` — tracks device allocations per pod/container."
